project_type: Flutter mobile app (Fantasy Cricket Platform) with Clean Architecture
test_framework: flutter_test (no existing tests for admin module)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to check for compile errors. The app uses Supabase backend so runtime testing requires credentials.
environment_constraints: Flutter SDK available. No Supabase/Firebase credentials for runtime testing. Validate via static analysis only.
contribution_requirements: Create branch, commit, push, and create PR to main.
key_patterns: ConsumerStatefulWidget with Riverpod, local setState for loading, WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for provider reads in initState, Supabase client via provider, StorageService for image upload, image_picker for gallery selection, AdminNavDrawer with currentRoute parameter, ElevatedButton.icon for body create buttons, no FAB, no AppBar create buttons, empty states instead of error states
directory_structure: lib/features/admin/{data/{repositories,services},domain/providers,presentation/{screens,widgets}}. SQL schemas in sql/ directory. Core utilities in lib/core/{theme,router,network,constants}.
